description_long: This is a single slip-on shoe featuring a classic black-and-white checkerboard canvas upper, reminiscent of the iconic Vans design. The shoe shows significant signs of wear, with visible dirt and scuff marks along the white rubber midsole and toe area. The collar and heel lining appear frayed and discolored, indicating heavy use. The outsole is partially visible and looks worn, with some grime embedded in the tread. The shoe lacks any visible laces, relying on elastic side gores for easy slip-on functionality. The overall silhouette is low-cut, and the interior lining appears to be made of a soft, possibly padded textile.
description: A heavily worn black-and-white checkerboard slip-on shoe with a frayed collar, dirty rubber sole, and no laces. The shoe shows significant signs of use and features elastic side gores for easy wear.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the frayed heel collar, checkerboard pattern, and worn rubber heel with visible dirt.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the checkerboard canvas, dirty and scuffed white midsole, and frayed collar.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the rounded toe, checkerboard pattern, and heavily soiled rubber toe cap.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible wear on the upper and midsole, and fraying around the collar.
